name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic By The Way Mini Boston Bag, brown FF jacquard fabric material, featuring beige leather FENDI ROMA lettering. Hard tortoiseshell-effect organic glass handle. Zipper closure. Lined interior with pockets and gold metal hardware. This bag comes with a handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody! Model: FD8067, Size: 20.5*9*12cm.
